channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canadiens take decisive 6-2 win over Hurricanes in Game 1 of Eastern Conference Final
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens delivered a strong opening performance in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Final, defeating the Carolina Hurricanes 6-2. The Canadiens established control early in the match, sh...

item.title: Diane Lane’s Early Career and Iconic Roles in the 1980s
item.description: Diane Lane, born January 22, 1965, is a celebrated American actress recognized for her work in both film and television. Her early career in the 1980s saw her transition from a popular child actor to ...

item.title: Oil Prices Increase Amid Uncertainty Over US-Iran Peace Talks
item.description: On Friday, oil prices saw an upward move, though they remain on track for a weekly decline, as investors showed scepticism about any major progress in US-Iran peace negotiations. Brent crude futures c...

item.title: Xbox Game Studios Launches Official Online Store for First-Party Game Merchandise
item.description: Microsoft has officially launched the Xbox Game Studios Shop, offering merchandise from its popular first-party titles, including Halo, Forza, Sea of Thieves, Grounded, and more. The store's initial c...

item.title: Mr Eazi and Temi Otedola announce birth of first child following their wedding
item.description: Na so the celebrity world dey celebrate today as Mr Eazi and Temi Otedola don welcome their first pikin. The couple wey marry last year for three different countries finally share the news on Instagra...

item.title: Roelf Meyer Appointed South African Ambassador to the United States to Focus on Trade Relations
item.description: South Africa has appointed veteran political negotiator Roelf Meyer as its new ambassador to the United States. Meyer, 78, officially presented his credentials to President Donald Trump on Thursday, t...

item.title: Trump Announces Deployment of 5,000 Troops to Poland Amid Shifts in US European Military Presence
item.description: President Donald Trump announced that the United States will deploy an additional 5,000 troops to Poland, reversing previous Pentagon decisions to reduce troop presence in Europe. This announcement fo...

item.title: Sindh government approves emergency funds to expedite Red Line BRT construction
item.description: KARACHI: The Sindh Cabinet on Thursday has approved off-budget emergency funding for TransKarachi, allowing the Frontier Works Organisation (FWO) to fast-track the long-delayed Red Line Bus Rapid Tran...

item.title: Deborah Kerr Portraits Captured During the Filming of 'The King and I' (1956)
item.description: The 1956 film adaptation of Rodgers and Hammerstein’s 'The King and I' remains a landmark in cinematic musicals, celebrated for its stunning visual presentation and compelling performances. Set in 186...

item.title: Delhi High Court grants Umar Khalid three-day interim bail for mother’s medical care
item.description: The Delhi High Court on Friday granted activist Umar Khalid interim bail for three days, from June 1 to June 3, to enable him to take care of his mother who is scheduled for surgery, Live Law reported...

item.title: Ukraine’s Ambassador Discusses U.S. Relations, Russia, and Prospects for Peace
item.description: Ukraine's ambassador provides an in-depth perspective on the current geopolitical landscape involving Ukraine, the United States, and Russia. He reflects on former President Donald Trump's engagement ...

item.title: Study Finds Certain Food Preservatives May Increase Cardiovascular Risks
item.description: A large French study has found that commonly used food preservatives, including some labeled as 'natural,' may be linked to higher risks of high blood pressure, heart attacks, and strokes. The researc...

item.title: TMDA Issues Safety Warning on Vega-100 Male Enhancement Product
item.description: Tanzania Medicines and Medical Devices Authority (TMDA) imeonya wananchi dhidi ya kutumia dawa ya kuongeza uwezo wa kiume inayoitwa Vega-100. Dawa hii inauzwa kama inavyoongeza utendaji wa kiume, laki...

item.title: Knicks take 2-0 lead in Eastern Conference Finals with strong performance from Josh Hart
item.description: The New York Knicks delivered a commanding performance against the Cleveland Cavaliers in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Finals, winning 109-93 and taking a 2-0 lead in the best-of-seven series. Cle...

item.title: Trump delays AI policy to avoid affecting US competitiveness with China
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced on May 21, 2026, that he would postpone signing an executive order on artificial intelligence. Trump expressed concerns about certain aspects of the order and empha...

item.title: Multiple Ebola Cases Spark Tensions and Border Restrictions in Africa
item.description: On 22 May 2026, eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo witnessed violent protests at Rwampara General Hospital after relatives of a young man who reportedly died from Ebola tried to remove his body ...

item.title: Spring/Summer 2026 Beauty Trends and Shopping Guide
item.description: Metro.Style presents a comprehensive guide to the top beauty products and trends for Spring and Summer 2026. Covering a wide range of items from skincare essentials to cosmetics, this playbook helps r...

item.title: CRTC increases Canadian content fees for streaming platforms
item.description: The Canadian Radio-television and Telecommunications Commission (CRTC) has announced new rules requiring streaming platforms such as Netflix, Disney+, and Amazon Prime to contribute significantly more...

item.title: PNP mobilizes tracker teams to serve ICC arrest warrant on Senator Bato dela Rosa
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has deployed tracker teams to locate and arrest Senator Ronald 'Bato' dela Rosa following an arrest warrant issued by the International Criminal Court (ICC) in con...

item.title: Femi Otedola shifts $100M from Geregu Power to Dangote Refinery ahead of September IPO
item.description: Nigerian billionaire Femi Otedola don sell him Geregu Power shares sharply to invest huge $100 million inside Dangote Refinery pre-IPO placement. E talk say this IPO fit be generational wealth opportu...
